text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm training with Hayahide today, so I can't hold
anything back!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket? I know I said I'd run with you, but there's
a limit to my endurance...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I believe it's time to take a break. If we continue,
we're sure to overwork ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
B-but I can still go on! Look, I suddenly feel
great...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: W-wooow! I'm floating! I'm floating in space!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And I can run on the air too! It's so soft and
springy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll zoom through the sky like a rocket,
and dash straight to the shiny sun!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket? Hey, Ticket! Get a grip! Wake up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hngh... Trainer? Hayahide? Why's everybody so
worked up?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You suddenly collapsed—of course we'd be
worked up. I'm glad it doesn't seem to be serious,
but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, listen up! I had such an exciting dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It was all soft and springy—totally the best! I feel
like I can run super fast now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, Winning Ticket's running improves
after the incident.
